title: Myrmechila platyptera
taxonomy: Myrmechila platyptera is a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Myrmechila, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. Within the family Orchidaceae, Myrmechila platyptera is classified as a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Further classification places it in the tribe Cranichideae. This orchid species is native to Australia.

In traditional medicine, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and infections. More research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal treatment.
